title_zh: 地緣與第二供應鏈雷達
method_en: Four blocks: (L1) the current export-control regime is a hand-curated, dated, tier-graded table of official rules; (L2) second-chain link-by-link completeness mirrors /bottleneck's Liebig minimum-law — the weakest link governs the composite; (L3) a China-semis vs western-tools stock basket (sentiment PROXY, weight 0 in the score) plus a bilingual news radar with keyword-rule headline classification; (L4/L5) strategic synthesis by Claude on refresh, deterministic rules fallback otherwise. Every capability % is an estimate (EST) — yields and costs inside China are opaque.
method_zh: 四個區塊:(L1)管制現況為人工策展、逐條標日期與證據等級的官方規則表;(L2)第二鏈逐環完整度沿用 /bottleneck 的 Liebig 最小值定律——最弱環節決定綜合分數;(L3)中國半導體 vs 西方設備股籃(情緒代理,計分權重 0)加雙語新聞雷達(關鍵字規則分類標題);(L4/L5)刷新時由 Claude 做策略綜合,否則走確定性規則後備。所有能力 % 皆為推估(EST)——中國境內良率與成本不透明。

regime.status_en: A100/H100-class banned since 2022-10; the 2023-10 performance-density update closed the A800/H800 workaround. The compliant H20 became license-required in 2025-04 (NVIDIA took a $5.5B charge), then licenses resumed from 2025-07 under a reported 15%-of-China-revenue arrangement (that arrangement is T2, reported not codified). Blackwell-class (B200/GB200) is not licensable; a scaled-down 'B30A' was publicly debated in late 2025 but not approved (T3).
regime.status_zh: A100/H100 級 2022-10 起禁售;2023-10 效能密度門檻補上 A800/H800 繞道。合規版 H20 於 2025-04 改為需許可(NVIDIA 認列 $5.5B 損失),2025-07 起恢復發證,傳聞附帶中國營收 15% 上繳安排(該安排為 T2,媒體報導、未成文)。Blackwell 級(B200/GB200)不可申請;降規版「B30A」2025 年底公開討論中、未批准(T3)。

regime.status_en: Huawei listed 2019-05, foreign direct product rule 2020-08 cut it off from all leading-edge foundries; SMIC listed 2020-12 with presumption-of-denial for advanced-node tools; 2024-12 added ~140 Chinese semiconductor entities (equipment makers, EDA, investment vehicles incl. Swaysure, SiCarrier, Piotech).
regime.status_zh: 華為 2019-05 上榜,2020-08 外國直接產品規則切斷其所有先進代工來源;中芯 2020-12 上榜,先進製程設備推定拒發;2024-12 再加約 140 家中國半導體實體(設備、EDA、投資載體,含昇維旭、新凱來、拓荊)。

regime.status_en: EUV has never been licensed to China (Dutch policy since 2019). Advanced immersion DUV (NXT:2000i and above) license-required from 2023-09; the Netherlands revoked NXT:1970i/1980i licenses from 2024-01; US 2024-12 rules extended servicing/parts restrictions. SMIC's ≤7nm runs on pre-restriction ASML immersion tools — a depreciating, non-replenishable stock.
regime.status_zh: EUV 從未對中發證(荷蘭 2019 年起政策)。先進浸潤式 DUV(NXT:2000i 以上)2023-09 起需許可;荷蘭 2024-01 起撤銷 1970i/1980i 出口證;美方 2024-12 擴及維修與零件。中芯 ≤7nm 靠管制前購入的 ASML 浸潤式機台——一個會折舊、無法補充的存量。

regime.status_en: BIS 2024-12: HBM above a memory-bandwidth-density threshold (covers HBM2E and up) is controlled to China — cutting Ascend-class accelerators off from Korean HBM and making CXMT the forced domestic substitute.
regime.status_zh: BIS 2024-12:記憶體頻寬密度超過門檻的 HBM(涵蓋 HBM2E 以上)對中管制——切斷昇騰級加速器的韓系 HBM 來源,長鑫(CXMT)被迫成為國產替代。

regime.status_en: GAAFET-oriented EDA controlled since 2022-08. In 2025-05 BIS letters briefly restricted Synopsys/Cadence/Siemens EDA sales into China; the restriction was lifted 2025-07 as part of the London framework — a live demonstration that EDA access can be switched off and on within weeks.
regime.status_zh: GAAFET 導向 EDA 自 2022-08 管制。2025-05 BIS 函令一度限制 Synopsys/Cadence/西門子 EDA 對中銷售;2025-07 隨倫敦框架解除——現場示範了 EDA 供應可以在數週內被關掉再打開。

regime.status_en: The three-tier global compute-cap framework announced 2025-01 was rescinded 2025-05 before taking effect, replaced by bilateral country deals plus guidance that using Huawei Ascend chips may violate US export controls (2025-05, wording softened 2025-06). Red line now moves deal-by-deal rather than by codified tiers.
regime.status_zh: 2025-01 公布的三級全球算力配額框架,2025-05 生效前即撤回,改為逐國雙邊協議,並發布「使用華為昇騰晶片可能違反美國出口管制」指引(2025-05,2025-06 措辭放軟)。紅線從成文分級改為逐案移動。
regime.source_zh: BIS 2025-01 規則;2025-05 撤回與指引

regime.status_en: Gallium/germanium controls 2023-08, outright Ga/Ge/Sb ban to the US 2024-12; rare-earth export controls 2025-04 (7 elements), expanded 2025-10 (+5 elements, extraterritorial 0.1% de-minimis); the 2025-10 expansion was suspended for one year in the 2025-11 truce. The Nexperia dispute (2025-10) showed legacy-chip chokepoints cut both ways.
regime.status_zh: 2023-08 鎵/鍺管制,2024-12 對美鎵/鍺/銻全面禁運;2025-04 稀土出口管制(7 元素),2025-10 擴大(+5 元素、0.1% 微量含量域外效力);2025-11 休戰協議將 2025-10 擴大部分暫停一年。安世(Nexperia)事件(2025-10)顯示成熟製程卡點是雙向的。

regime.status_en: Renting controlled compute through overseas clouds and transshipment via third-country hubs remain incompletely closed; KYC rules proposed but not final, enforcement cases (Southeast-Asia routes) ongoing. Denominator unknown — this gap is unquantifiable by design.
regime.status_zh: 透過海外雲租用受管制算力、經第三地轉口走私,均未完全堵上;KYC 規則僅提案未定案,執法個案(東南亞路徑)進行中。分母未知——這個缺口天生不可量化。
regime.source_zh: 執法報導;規則提案(僅推估)

contributions.name_zh: 2022-10 管制(A100/H100 禁售、美籍人員規則)
2023-10 效能密度更新,封殺 A800/H800
2024-12 HBM 規則+約 140 家實體清單

contributions.name_en: Huawei Ascend 'anywhere in the world' guidance
contributions.name_zh: 2025-05 華為昇騰「全球適用」指引

contributions.name_en: H20 licenses resume; EDA restriction lifted
contributions.name_zh: 2025-07 H20 恢復發證;EDA 限制解除
2025-08 中國營收 15% 上繳安排(報導)
2025-10 中國稀土管制擴大(域外效力)
2025-11 釜山休戰:稀土擴大暫停一年

level.note_en: EUV embargo, advanced-DUV licensing, HBM rule, entity list + FDPR all remain in force. The direction score below measures only the marginal 12-month drift, not the level.
level.note_zh: EUV 禁運、先進 DUV 許可制、HBM 規則、實體清單+FDPR 全數仍然有效。下方方向分數只量測近 12 個月的邊際漂移,不是管制水位本身。

links.source_en: Empyrean/Primarius/Semitronix coverage estimates; no verified full RTL-to-GDS flow at ≤7nm
links.source_zh: 華大九天/概倫/廣立微覆蓋度推估;≤7nm 無經驗證的完整 RTL-to-GDS 流程
links.evidence_en: Domestic EDA covers analog and mature digital flows; the 2025-05 restriction episode accelerated import substitution budgets; Huawei claims internal tools sufficient for 14nm-and-above.
links.evidence_zh: 國產 EDA 覆蓋類比與成熟數位流程;2025-05 斷供事件加速了替代預算;華為宣稱內部工具可支撐 14nm 以上。
links.west_anchor_en: Synopsys / Cadence / Siemens EDA hold effectively the whole advanced-node design flow
links.west_anchor_zh: Synopsys / Cadence / 西門子 EDA 幾乎壟斷先進製程設計全流程

links.name_zh: 半導體設備(微影·蝕刻·沉積)
links.source_en: link % = MIN of sub-components (Liebig within the link): litho governs
links.source_zh: 環節 % = 子項最小值(環節內 Liebig):微影決定
links.evidence_en: Etch (AMEC) and deposition (NAURA) are genuinely competitive; lithography is not — SMEE 28nm-class DUV shipped in small numbers with no volume production line, immersion prototypes unverified (T3). Years-behind is set by litho (~15 vs EUV).
links.evidence_zh: 蝕刻(中微)與沉積(北方華創)確實有競爭力;微影沒有——上海微電子 28nm 級 DUV 僅少量交付、無量產線,浸潤式原型未經證實(T3)。落後年數由微影決定(對 EUV 約 15 年)。
links.west_anchor_en: ASML (litho) / LAM·AMAT·TEL (etch·depo) — litho is the hard wall: EUV embargoed, advanced DUV licensed
links.west_anchor_zh: ASML(微影)/ LAM·AMAT·TEL(蝕刻·沉積)——微影是硬牆:EUV 禁運、先進 DUV 許可制

sub_components.note_en: 28nm-class DUV, small numbers, no volume line; immersion unverified
sub_components.note_zh: 28nm 級 DUV 少量交付、無量產線;浸潤式未證實

sub_components.note_en: CCP/ICP etch competitive at leading edge, used in advanced fabs
sub_components.note_zh: CCP/ICP 蝕刻在先進製程具競爭力,已進先進廠

sub_components.note_en: Broad PVD/CVD/ALD portfolio, mature-node proven, advancing
sub_components.note_zh: PVD/CVD/ALD 產品線廣,成熟製程已驗證,持續推進

links.source_en: N+2 (~7nm) HVM confirmed by Kirin 9000s teardown (T1 physical evidence, 2023); N+3 (~5nm-class) yield estimates 20–33% are T3
links.source_zh: N+2(約 7nm)量產有麒麟 9000s 拆解實證(T1 實物證據,2023);N+3(約 5nm 級)良率推估 20–33% 為 T3
links.evidence_en: N+2 ships in volume (Huawei phones, Ascend); N+3 reportedly runs for Ascend at low yield via DUV multi-patterning — a cost/throughput penalty that scales badly. Capacity is bounded by the fixed stock of pre-restriction immersion tools.
links.evidence_zh: N+2 已規模出貨(華為手機、昇騰);N+3 傳聞以 DUV 多重曝光為昇騰試產、良率偏低——成本與產出的懲罰隨規模惡化。產能受限於管制前購入的浸潤式機台存量。
links.west_anchor_en: TSMC N3/N2 in HVM; SMIC's N+2 ≈ TSMC 2018-era N7 economics, without EUV
links.west_anchor_zh: 台積電 N3/N2 已量產;中芯 N+2 約當台積電 2018 年 N7 的經濟性,且無 EUV

links.source_en: CXMT HBM2/2E in production 2024–25; HBM3 sampling reported 2025 (unverified volume/yield)
links.source_zh: 長鑫 HBM2/2E 2024–25 已投產;HBM3 送樣報導見於 2025(量與良率未證實)
links.evidence_en: The 2024-12 HBM rule forced Ascend onto domestic HBM; CXMT is the single point of substitution. Two generations behind and stacking/TSV yield is the open question.
links.evidence_zh: 2024-12 HBM 規則迫使昇騰改用國產 HBM;長鑫是唯一替代點。落後兩個世代,堆疊/TSV 良率是未解問題。
links.west_anchor_en: SK hynix / Samsung / Micron shipping HBM3E, HBM4 arriving 2026
links.west_anchor_zh: SK 海力士/三星/美光已出 HBM3E,HBM4 於 2026 到位

links.source_en: SJSemi/JCET/Tongfu 2.5D offerings + Huawei in-house; capacity small vs TSMC CoWoS
links.source_zh: 盛合晶微/長電/通富 2.5D 產品+華為自建;產能相對台積電 CoWoS 仍小
links.evidence_en: 2.5D interposer lines exist and are scaling; packaging is the nearest structural leapfrog — it multiplies effective compute per wafer without needing EUV, which is why '國產 CoWoS' headlines matter more than they look.
links.evidence_zh: 2.5D 中介層產線已存在且在放量;封裝是最近的結構性彎道——不需要 EUV 就能放大每片晶圓的有效算力,所以「國產 CoWoS」新聞比表面更重要。
links.west_anchor_en: TSMC CoWoS/SoIC — see /bottleneck for the western chain's own CoWoS constraint (method aligned, numbers live there)
links.west_anchor_zh: 台積電 CoWoS/SoIC——西方鏈自身的 CoWoS 瓶頸見 /bottleneck 卡(方法對齊,數字在該卡,不在此重寫)

links.source_en: Huawei UnifiedBus / CloudMatrix 384 system demos; Chinese optical-module vendors globally competitive
links.source_zh: 華為 UnifiedBus / CloudMatrix 384 系統實證;中國光模組廠商具全球競爭力
links.evidence_en: CloudMatrix shows the system-level workaround: lash more weaker chips together with strong fabric, pay in power. Optics is a Chinese strength, not a gap.
links.evidence_zh: CloudMatrix 展示系統級繞道:用強互連把更多較弱晶片綁在一起,代價是電力。光通訊是中國強項而非缺口。
links.west_anchor_zh: NVIDIA NVLink/InfiniBand + 博通乙太網生態

links.source_en: Models (DeepSeek/Qwen) near-frontier is T2 benchmark evidence; CANN-vs-CUDA toolchain gap is T3 judgment
links.source_zh: 模型(DeepSeek/Qwen)近前沿有 T2 基準測試佐證;CANN 對 CUDA 的工具鏈差距為 T3 判斷
links.evidence_en: Model quality is nearly closed (months, not years); the toolchain (CANN vs CUDA, kernels, debuggers, community) is the real lag — blended years-behind of ~3 mixes ~1 for models with ~5 for toolchain.
links.evidence_zh: 模型品質差距接近抹平(以月計,非以年計);工具鏈(CANN 對 CUDA、kernel、除錯、社群)才是真正落後——綜合落後約 3 年,是模型約 1 年與工具鏈約 5 年的混合。
links.west_anchor_en: CUDA moat + frontier labs; open-weight Chinese models already near-frontier
links.west_anchor_zh: CUDA 護城河+前沿實驗室;中國開放權重模型已近前沿

composite.binding_name_zh: 半導體設備(微影·蝕刻·沉積)
composite.note_en: Composite = 0.7 × MIN(link %) + 0.3 × MEAN(link %). Liebig's law of the minimum, same method as /bottleneck: a chain is as complete as its weakest link; the mean term credits partial progress. Stock-price momentum has weight 0.
composite.note_zh: 綜合分數 = 0.7 × 最弱環節 % + 0.3 × 各環節平均 %。Liebig 最小值定律,方法與 /bottleneck 對齊:鏈的完整度由最弱環節決定;平均項給部分進度部分學分。股價動能權重為 0。

market.read_en: Market is bidding western tools over the second chain
market.read_zh: 市場偏向西方設備股,相對第二鏈
market.proxy_note_en: PROXY ONLY — 1-month price momentum is sentiment, not capability. Weight 0 in the completeness score (same honesty rule as /pricing).
market.proxy_note_zh: 僅為代理——1 個月價格動能是情緒,不是能力。在完整度分數中權重為 0(與 /pricing 同一誠實規則)。

concentration.scope_en: Share of global ≤N5 logic capacity located in Taiwan
concentration.scope_zh: 全球 N5 以下邏輯產能位於台灣的比重
concentration.source_en: Industry capacity estimates (TrendForce/SEMI-class); definition-sensitive, treat as ±5pp
concentration.source_zh: 產業產能推估(TrendForce/SEMI 類);對口徑敏感,應視為 ±5 個百分點

diversification.site_zh: 台積電亞利桑那 Fab 21 一期
台積電亞利桑那二期/三期
diversification.status_zh: 2025-03 千億美元擴建案下已宣布

diversification.site_zh: 台積電熊本 JASM 一/二廠
diversification.status_en: JASM1 in HVM; JASM2 schedule has slipped (T3)
diversification.status_zh: 一廠已量產;二廠時程已延後(T3)

diversification.site_zh: 非台積電美國先進產能
diversification.node_zh: Intel 18A 爬坡(2025)· 三星 Taylor 2nm 目標 2026
diversification.status_zh: 兩者時程歷史上皆多次變動(T2)

projection.text_en: Taiwan's share of TSMC ≤N7 capacity: ~100% (2024) → est. 85–90% by 2028 as Arizona/Kumamoto/Dresden ramp. The leading edge (N2/A16) stays Taiwan-first until Arizona P3 (~2030). Diversification is real but slow — geographic concentration remains the strategic fact.
projection.text_zh: 台積電 ≤N7 產能的台灣比重:約 100%(2024)→ 推估 2028 年降至 85–90%(亞利桑那/熊本/德勒斯登爬坡)。最先進世代(N2/A16)在亞利桑那三期(約 2030)之前仍是台灣優先。分散是真的但很慢——地理集中仍是戰略事實。

strategic_read.summary_en: The second chain is 25.4/100 — real but far from self-sufficient, gated by equipment at 18%. Your ≤N5 moat holds this quarter: 87% of global advanced-logic capacity is in Taiwan and no one can replicate litho short-term. The immediate risk is not supply erosion but demand-map policy: control direction is EASING (-0.73) yet the regime stays structurally TIGHT, so an H20-style overnight customer-list redraw remains the live decision variable. News flow is escalation-skewed (7 vs 1). Plan capacity on the truce, but keep China-exposed order books hedged against a snap FDPR/entity-list round.
strategic_read.summary_zh: 第二供應鏈25.4/100，真實存在但遠未自足，瓶頸卡在設備18%。本季你的≤N5護城河穩固：全球87%先進邏輯產能在台灣，短期無人能複製微影。眼前風險不是供給侵蝕，而是需求端政策：管制方向正在鬆動(-0.73)，但體制層級仍結構性緊縮，H20式一夜改寫客戶清單仍是最活躍的決策變數。新聞面偏升級(7比1)。以停火假設規劃產能，但對中國曝險訂單保留對沖，防範突發FDPR或實體清單。

moat_read.summary_en: Fast-eroding links are the workaround category: interconnect 60% (~2y), models/software 55% (~3y), advanced packaging 40% (~4y), HBM 30% (~4y) — none need EUV-class physics, so China closes these on engineering effort and capital. These directly chip at packaging/HBM adjacencies. Slow links are physics-bound: equipment 18% (~15y) and EDA 40% (~8y) govern the whole chain under Liebig — SMIC foundry at 55% (~6y) cannot outrun its 18% tool base. Watch packaging and interconnect as the near-term moat leaks; the ≤N5 leading edge stays protected as long as equipment sits at 18%.
moat_read.summary_zh: 侵蝕最快的是可繞道環節：互連60%(~2年)、模型軟體55%(~3年)、先進封裝40%(~4年)、HBM30%(~4年)——皆不需EUV級物理，中國靠工程與資本即可補齊，直接侵蝕封裝/HBM周邊。慢環節受物理鎖死：設備18%(~15年)、EDA40%(~8年)依Liebig法則主宰全鏈——SMIC代工55%(~6年)跑不過其18%的設備基礎。近期護城河漏點盯封裝與互連；只要設備停在18%，≤N5尖端仍受保護。

control_read.summary_en: Red line now: H20-class and mid-tier accelerators licensable under conditions; leading-edge ≤N5 tooling and top GPUs (B-class) denied. The 12m drift is EASING (-0.73) but level is Structurally TIGHT — this gap matters: direction reflects tactical truce concessions, level reflects the permanent equipment/EUV wall that will not move. Do not read easing as structural liberalization; it is reversible overnight (2025-04 H20 precedent). The escalation-heavy news count (7 vs 1) despite negative drift signals a fragile easing. Treat licensable China demand as callable at any review, structurally cap it in planning.
control_read.summary_zh: 當前紅線：H20級與中階加速器有條件可授權；尖端≤N5設備與頂級GPU(B級)遭拒。12個月漂移為鬆動(-0.73)，但層級為結構性緊縮——此落差關鍵：方向反映戰術性停火讓步，層級反映不會移動的設備/EUV永久壁壘。勿把鬆動誤讀為結構性開放；它可一夜逆轉(2025-04 H20前例)。負漂移下新聞仍偏升級(7比1)，顯示脆弱鬆動。規劃上把可授權的中國需求視為隨時可被召回，結構性設上限。

scenarios.trigger_en: 2026-11 review renews truce; H20-class licensing continues; no new entity-list shock; completeness creeps single digits/yr.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 2026-11審查續簽停火；H20級授權延續；無新實體清單衝擊；完整度年增個位數。

scenarios.trigger_en: Truce collapses — rare-earth expansion reinstated or new FDPR round; China customer lists redrawn overnight per 2025-04 H20 precedent.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 停火破裂——稀土管制擴大或新一輪FDPR；仿2025-04 H20前例一夜改寫中國客戶清單。

scenarios.trigger_en: CXMT HBM3 in volume + SMIC N+3 yield past ~50%, or SMEE immersion DUV in a volume line — completeness step-change, moat re-rating.
scenarios.trigger_zh: CXMT HBM3量產+SMIC N+3良率過~50%，或SMEE浸潤式DUV進量產線——完整度跳升，護城河重評。

scenarios.trigger_en: B30A-class chips broadly relicensed traded for rare-earth/trade concessions — demand map redrawn upward, second-chain urgency fades.
scenarios.trigger_zh: B30A級晶片廣泛重新授權，換取稀土/貿易讓步——需求地圖上修，第二鏈急迫性消退。

falsification.en: Equipment link moves off 18% materially (e.g., SMEE volume immersion DUV) — invalidates the physics-bound slow-moat thesis.
falsification.zh: 設備環節明顯脫離18%（如SMEE浸潤式DUV量產）——推翻物理鎖死的慢護城河論點。

falsification.en: Control drift reverses to tightening with a hard entity-list/FDPR round before the 2026-11 review — proves easing was not directional.
falsification.zh: 管制漂移在2026-11審查前反轉為緊縮並祭出硬性實體清單/FDPR——證明鬆動非方向性。

falsification.en: Taiwan ≤N5 concentration drops well below 87% via overseas fab ramp — erodes the concentration-based moat premise.
falsification.zh: 台灣≤N5集中度因海外廠爬坡明顯跌破87%——侵蝕以集中度為基礎的護城河前提。

watchlist.en: 2026-11 truce review outcome and H20 licensing status
New FDPR / entity-list actions vs de-escalation signals (currently 7:1 escalation)
watchlist.zh: 新FDPR/實體清單行動 vs 降溫信號（現為7:1升級）

watchlist.en: CXMT HBM3 volume and SMIC N+3 yield disclosures
watchlist.zh: CXMT HBM3量產與SMIC N+3良率揭露

watchlist.en: SMEE immersion DUV progress in any volume line
watchlist.zh: SMEE浸潤式DUV於任何量產線進展
B30A級重新授權/稀土談判動向

watchlist.en: Advanced packaging & interconnect capacity buildout (fast-erode links 40%/60%)
watchlist.zh: 先進封裝與互連產能擴建（快侵蝕環節40%/60%）

watchlist.en: Taiwan ≤N5 concentration vs overseas fab ramp (87% baseline)
watchlist.zh: 台灣≤N5集中度 vs 海外廠爬坡（87%基準）

blind_spots_en: Yields are opaque: every China-domestic capability % is an estimate (EST); no official yield/cost data exists, so the composite is a judgment scaffold, not a measurement.
Policy is discontinuous by nature: the direction score describes the past 12 months and cannot be extrapolated — one rule change re-draws the map overnight (H20, 2025-04→07).
Military-civil fusion information fog: both sides strategically release and withhold information; T3 headlines may themselves be signaling operations.
Stock prices are a sentiment PROXY, not a capability measurement — weight 0 in the completeness score.
Smuggling, transshipment and cloud-rental grey channels are unquantifiable; actual Chinese access to compute exceeds what the legal map shows.
blind_spots_zh: 良率不透明:所有中國國產能力 % 皆為推估(EST);沒有官方良率/成本數據,綜合分數是判斷鷹架,不是量測。
政策天生不連續:方向分數只描述過去 12 個月,不能外推——一紙規則就能一夕重畫版圖(H20,2025-04→07)。
軍民融合資訊迷霧:雙方都策略性釋放與隱匿資訊;T3 新聞本身可能就是訊號操作。
股價是情緒代理,不是能力量測——在完整度分數中權重為 0。
走私、轉口與雲端租算灰色通道無法量化;中國實際可得算力高於合法版圖所顯示。
disclaimer_en: Estimates are estimates, not asserted truth. Not investment advice.
disclaimer_zh: 推估就是推估,不是斷言的事實。非投資建議。
